{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"OPTIMIZER = "adamw"","old":"OPTIMIZER = "adam"","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3.9e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.95)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"build_scheduler","new":"","old":"","op":"replace_function","source":"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):
    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:
        return None
    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100
    total_steps = max(total_steps, 1)
    return optim.lr_scheduler.OneCycleLR(
        optimizer,
        max_lr=LEARNING_RATE,
        total_steps=total_steps,
        pct_start=0.1,
        anneal_strategy="cos",
        div_factor=10.0,
        final_div_factor=100.0,
    )","text":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Use a fixed-step-friendly optimization recipe: much larger batches, AdamW, a higher peak learning rate, and a OneCycle schedule that actually matches the 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro","indexing"]}

{"primary_mode":"layout","declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","secondary_modes":["micro","caching"],"rationale":"Keep the successful optimizer/schedule setup, but give the MLP more capacity and better data coverage per step by deepening and widening it while halving the batch size.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 24","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"CHANNEL_MULT = 2","new":"CHANNEL_MULT = 1","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 384","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}
